title: FULLY FREE GLM-5.2 + Z-Code: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
summary: Z AI launched Z Code, a coding agent built for GLM models that offers 5 million free tokens per day. It provides a Codex-like interface with project generation, element inspection, and DevTools integration, though some features like file explorer and git initialization remain missing. GLM-5.2 achieves strong performance on coding and reasoning benchmarks with MIT licensing.
writeup: The video covers Z Code, a new coding agent from Z AI built for GLM models, with a free tier that allows 5 million tokens daily. It demonstrates Codex-like functionality including code generation, project creation, and element inspection, running on the GLM-5.2 model. The takeaways: the free tier removes a cost barrier for an agentic coding workflow, and GLM-5.2 shows strong results on coding and reasoning benchmarks.
